In order to combat global warming, lower CO2 emissions, including from electricity production, have become increasingly important.

Despite the increase in production and use of renewable energy, it was not possible to reduce the use of fossil fuels at global level in 2019; on the contrary, the use of fossil fuels is also increasing.
In the context of the sustainability of energy supply, renewable energy sources and other energy sources or measures are included.
In view of climate change, it is important that in the long term reserve capacity is made up of renewable energy sources as much as possible.
Smart grids By sending demand for electricity, the risk of shortages can be reduced and available electricity distributed more efficiently.
